name: map-stats-panel
description: Floating data-display panel showing aggregate statistics for the current filtered map view. Always visible; updates reactively when filters (country chips, family checkboxes) change. Positioned top-right to avoid collision with map zoom controls. Reference implementation: gis.woodfinegroup.com (v0.1.94).
html:
Corridors
{{count}}
Anchors
{{count}}
Countries
{{count}}
Avg cluster grade
{{grade}}
positioning: top: 16px; right: 16px; position: absolute over map container.

variants.name: with-sparkline
variants.description: Each cell carries a small inline sparkline. Phase-2 use.

aria: role='region' + aria-label='Map statistics'. aria-live='polite' — filter-change updates announced without interrupting current speech. Each stat cell uses <dt>/<dd> pairing. <dd aria-label='N corridors'> spells out units when not implicit. Contrast 4.5:1 on label, 7:1 on value.
open_questions: oq-1: Should the panel auto-collapse on small viewports (mobile <640px) and expand on tap, or always stay visible? Decision pending mobile usage telemetry.
